enforcement_surfaces.authority_safety_posture: Release evidence must fail closed before promotion rather than relying on human memory.
enforcement_surfaces.operator_visible_effect: Reviewers know which schema or validator enforces each promotion boundary.
enforcement_surfaces.recovery_posture: Enforcement remains deterministic and reproducible from local schemas and validators.
enforcement_surfaces.trigger_or_entry_condition: Promotion governance is validated or forensic-checked.

rows.authority_safety_posture: Provider-profile and client-window drift cannot silently reuse green evidence from a different candidate.

rows.authority_safety_posture: Release evidence must fail closed before promotion rather than relying on human memory.
rows.operator_visible_effect: Reviewers know which schema or validator enforces each promotion boundary.
